general.condstr: You need at least 40% reputation with the Soromid.
general.description: This launcher is an extensively bioengineered colony of spaceflight-capable single celled organisms. On demand, a pheromone release with a complex biologically encoded target signature will signal the colony's 'defense response', and a plasmoid will be released to persue a matching target. It will rupture on contact, releasing a particularly potent soup of bioplasma to melt through the target's hull. As they are biological, most forms of conventional missile jamming are ineffective against these creatures. This larger variant of plasmoid is most effective against slow, armored targets.
